text: The improvements are well maintained and feature limited physical depreciation due to normal wear and tear. Some components, but not every major building component, may be updated or recently rehabilitated. The structure has been well maintained. During the time of inspection the basement and foundation were observed and no immediate necessary repairs were identified. The condition of the subject's foundation is consistent with that of houses of a similar age and location, however, the appraiser lacks the qualifications to be considered an expert in foundation repair. During the time of inspection Unit #3 was in the process of being updated with new flooring, interior paint, and kitchen cabinetry. The subject features two units with one bedroom and one bathroom and two units with two bedrooms and one bathroom. The common areas include an entrance foyer, hallways, stairwells, and coin operated laundry service. There is assigned exterior parking for tenants in the rear of the property.
